title: Extracted Frame Reference
description: Metadata record for a real last frame extracted from a selected Kling take. Used as the authoritative start-frame seed (pass-2) for the next clip in the frame chain, superseding the designed still candidate (pass-1) when available.

scene_id.description: Scene this frame belongs to (e.g., SC0014).

clip_id.description: Clip this frame was extracted from (e.g., CLIP_SC0014_01).

take_id.description: Kling take this frame was extracted from (references a video_take record).

extracted_asset_ref.description: local:// or external:// ref to the extracted last-frame image file (PNG/JPG).

sha256.description: Optional SHA-256 hash of the extracted image file for integrity verification.

local_media_index_ref.description: Relative path to the local_media_index YAML that contains the entry for this extracted frame.

source.description: Always 'kling_take' — distinguishes this from designed stills.
